messages.content: You are a wind turbine technical support assistant. Given a Jira ticket summary and description, classify the ticket into the correct component category.

Unexpected: DCN System 8000 controller fails built-in self-test on specific analog channel On turbine at Cactus Flats, the TTE switch module fails User IO electronics module channel test.

No hardware fault was found during on-site inspection. the supervision logic does not account for transient operating states.

Proposing to adjust supervision limits as an interim fix.
CHW
You are a wind turbine technical support assistant. Given a Jira ticket summary and description, classify the ticket into the correct component category.

Review needed: fuse protection element full recalibration after field replacement After a yaw operation during high wind conditions, the fuse protection element requires full recalibration after field replacement on 5 turbines at Beatrice.

Data analysis shows that the problem was introduced with the latest software release update. This occurs only during specific wind speed and direction conditions.

A temporary patch was applied but the issue recurred after 48 hours.
CHW
You are a wind turbine technical support assistant. Given a Jira ticket summary and description, classify the ticket into the correct component category.

Fire detection system requires manual reset after grid voltage disturbance – SW 2022.12.101 During normal operation the emergency stop circuit monitoring fails to detect actual overspeed condition in test.

Local team confirmed the issue is seen 2-3 times daily on the worst affected turbines. No immediate production impact but the alarm causes confusion for operators.

Please investigate and provide a fix in the next release.

Turbine type: 3.6MW, Software version: 2021.22.31.
Related observation: for those nodes which are powered
Safety
You are a wind turbine technical support assistant. Given a Jira ticket summary and description, classify the ticket into the correct component category.

Motor shutoff safety function inconsistent behavior between redundant safety channels after software update (V117) We are seeing that the safety license management reports yaw cable twist alarm with incorrect angle count on affected turbines.

Local team confirmed the issue is seen only on turbines with the newer hardware revision installed. Site availability is reduced due to frequent stop-start cycles.

Suggest coordinating with the hardware team for investigation.

Local team confirmed the issue is intermittent and has proven difficult to reproduce on demand. The turbine cannot return to production without on-site intervention.

A temporary patch was applied but the issue recurred after 48 hours.
